guides.title: ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 12 Fan Replacement
guides.introduction: The cooling fan in the X1 Carbon Gen 12 can fail after sustained thermal load, causing throttling under prolonged compute.
guides.conclusion: Replacing the fan restores sustained performance and fixes the throttling.

guides.title: Dell XPS 15 9530 Battery Replacement
guides.introduction: Battery swelling after a year of heavy travel and daily charging is a common XPS 15 9530 failure mode.
